title: SmartScanState
description: Persisted result of the most recent successful full-scope jankurai audit, used by smart scan to decide whether a fast scan suffices.

last_full_scan_at.description: Unix seconds when the full scan completed.

last_full_scan_commit.description: Short git commit SHA at the time of the full scan.

last_full_hard_findings.description: Hard-finding count from the full scan (0 = clean).

last_full_caps.description: Score caps applied during the full scan (empty = clean).

last_full_auditor_version.description: Auditor version that produced the state (semver).
